headline: Baird Upgrades Union Pacific (UNP) and Raises Target, Sees Upside from Potential Rail Deal
summary: Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) is included among the 14 Stocks on the Verge of Becoming Dividend Aristocrats. On March 6, Baird upgraded Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) to Outperform from Neutral. It also raised its price target to $311 from $239. The firm said it recommends buying the shares on pullbacks. According to the analyst, Union […]

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Rail merger critics should “quit looking backward,” says Union Pacific CEO
summary: Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena responded to negative reaction to the proposed rail merger with Norfolk Southern, saying critics should look past history — and his own numbers — to see how the transcontinental tie-up will reshape the U.S. supply chain for the better. The post EXCLUSIVE: Rail merger critics should “quit looking backward,” says Union Pacific CEO appeared first on FreightWaves.
